title: Haffner Energy and ATOBA Energy Collaborate to Unlock the SAF Value Chain and Scale the Market
content: Haffner Energy, a leading solid biomass-to-clean fuels solutions provider, and ATOBA Energy, a SAF aggregator, are joining forces to accelerate the development of SAF projects and facilitate their financing. The company has already announced the development of a couple of SAF projects, notably Paris-Vatry SAF in France, where full scale production is expected to be reached by 2030 when the next stage of the European SAF mandate kicks in.
author: Analysts Account
